mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM(member_no, name, password, createdDt) VALUES (#{creatorId}, #{request.name}, #{request.password}, NOW())
INSERT INTO CHAT_MESSAGE (roomId, member_no, nickname, content, type, createdDt) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{senderNickname}, #{content}, #{type}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT messageNo AS messageId, roomId AS roomId, member_no AS senderId, nickname AS senderNickname, content AS content, type AS type, createdDt AS createdDt FROM CHAT_MESSAGE WHERE messageNo = #{messageId}

SELECT CR.roomId AS roomId, CR.member_no AS memberNo, CR.name AS name FROM CHAT_ROOM CR JOIN ROOM_MEMBER RM ON RM.roomId = CR.roomId WHERE RM.member_no = #{memberNo} AND RM.deletedDt IS NULL AND CR.deletedDt IS NULL
SELECT roomId AS roomId, member_no AS memberNo, name AS name FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE roomId = #{roomId} AND deletedDt IS NULL
SELECT roomId AS roomId, member_no AS memberNo, name AS name FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE deletedDt IS NULL ORDER BY createdDt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ROOM_MEMBER (roomId, member_no, createdDt) VALUES ( #{roomId} , #{memberNo} , NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT password FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE roomId = #{roomId} AND deletedDt IS NULL
